rationale: The cited paper is used as part of grouped background citations to support general claims that referral programs can attract better-matched, higher-value customers. In the citing article, it appears in literature lists alongside other referral-program studies and as broad context for why referees may already be preselected by referrers. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses, mechanisms, design, or analyses on this specific study's framework or findings in a distinct way.
